reviews.comment:
Muy buena cabaña solo 1 para 2 personas. Tiene WiFi te agua caliente buena cocina equipada. Solo cama matrimonial.rrlax zona arroyo todo al lado

(Translated by Google)
Very nice cabin, just one for two people. It has Wi-Fi, hot water, and a well-equipped kitchen. Double bed only. The creek area is right next to everything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNneVllUW9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy muy lenta los atención. Había 6 vehículos delante mío y tuve que esperar más de media hora. Eran 3 playeros atendiendo.
Ni siquiera se ofrecieron a limpiar los vidrios como es costumbre en la zona.

(Translated by Google)
The service was incredibly slow. There were six cars ahead of me, and I had to wait over half an hour. There were only three attendants working.
They didn't even offer to clean the windshields, which is customary in this area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcjZ5VlNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Atencion regular de los Playeros. Poco amabilidad en la atencion y predisposicion en realizar el trabajo

(Translated by Google)
Average service from the beach attendants. Lack of friendliness and willingness to do their job.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBM0xTdm1RRRAB

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNnJhcm9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Servicios las 24 hs. Duchas con cambiador y agua caliente todo el día. Excelente limpieza de las instalaciones. Seguridad las 24 hs. Empleados con información de recorridos y excursiones. Espacios amplios, con toma de energía para cada parcela. Y con un arroyo que atraviesa el camping.

(Translated by Google)
24-hour services. Showers with changing facilities and hot water throughout the day. Excellent cleanliness of the facilities. 24-hour security. Staff with information on tours and excursions. Spacious spaces with power outlets for each pitch. A stream runs through the campsite.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnd0piSjBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar!  Ambiente familiar y seguro, con muy buenos sanitarios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place! Family-friendly and safe environment, with very good restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcDlhUEZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Lenta para atender, en momentos hay colas hasta la calle. Y solo tienen un inflador por lo que hay mucha espera.

(Translated by Google)
The service is slow, and at times the lines stretch out into the street. They only have one pump, so there's a long wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnX1lXLTd3RRAB
